---
title: "Luis Alfredo López Gonzales"
subtitle: "Especialista en SIG y Python para Análisis Geoespacial"
author: "Email: lalgonzales@gmail.com · LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/lalgonzales/"

format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    geometry: [top=0.7in, left=1in, right=1in, bottom=1in]
    fontsize: 11pt
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    css: cv.css
    embed-resources: true
---

<!-- Contact moved to YAML `author` to reduce top-page spacing; title placement adjusted via header-includes -->

{{< include secciones/perfil.md >}}

{{< include secciones/competencias.md >}}

{{< include secciones/herramientas.md >}}

{{< include secciones/experiencias.md >}}

{{< include secciones/educacion.md >}}

{{< include secciones/certificaciones.md >}}

{{< include secciones/idiomas.md >}}

{{< include secciones/referencias.md >}}
